codeReview.summary: The feature removes placeholder rank copy and consistently adds truthful card metadata for both reconstructed and stored matches via a shared metadata mapper. I found no blocking or non-blocking implementation issues against VAL-MATCH-001 and VAL-MATCH-002.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker did not follow the web-feature-worker instruction to run the committed lint/static-check gate for this UI-facing feature; the handoff reports tests, typecheck, build, and dev-server evidence only.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff C:\Users\bendc\.factory\missions\7b970ada-3b1a-476d-827a-4cd2a618e64e\handoffs\2026-03-30T06-26-05-802Z__match-card-metadata-and-truthful-rank__3b6de4f9-109a-4a11-a172-291478d39282.json lists pnpm test, pnpm exec tsc --noEmit, pnpm run build, and dev-server checks, but no pnpm run lint/pnpm run static-check, despite .factory/services.yaml and .factory/skills/web-feature-worker/SKILL.md naming lint/static-check as committed gates.

summary: Reviewed feature match-card-metadata-and-truthful-rank by reading mission docs, the worker handoff/transcript skeleton, the feature commit diff, and the affected dashboard and mapper files. The implementation satisfies the truthful rank fallback and enriched match-card metadata requirements for both stored and reconstructed matches; I recorded one shared-state observation about the worker skill/validation procedure.
